reason: Java 版 backend 指南总索引；Rust 实现要沿用 directory-structure / error-handling / logging / quality / persistence 五个维度的设计思路
core/ vs web/ 分层、feature-based packaging、event/payload mirror 模式；Rust workspace 的 crates 组织要复用这些约束（core 不依赖 UI 层）
Java checked/unchecked 分类映射到 Rust 的 thiserror(库) + anyhow(应用) 模型；保持错误边界和异常语义
日志级别矩阵与参数化格式要迁移到 tracing crate，保证日志行为与 Java 版可对照
DI / final / 测试框架策略翻译为 Rust 对等（显式依赖传参、默认不可变、cargo test + mockall + assert）；覆盖率与最小测试要求不降
no-db 文件系统持久化契约：config.json + clients/*.client + torrents/*.torrent 布局与 archive 规则必须完全保留，用户迁移零成本
用户指定的重构手册（Fowler 中译要点），所有改动须遵循
原则；禁止把功能变更与结构调整混在同一个提交

summary: Implemented S4 client static config and generator foundations in joal-core: Casing, byte-level UrlEncoder, RequestEvent/NumwantProvider, peer-id/key algorithm dispatch shells, BitTorrentClientConfig parsing/integrity validation, and golden/unit tests for qbittorrent-4.5.0 compatibility.

Implemented S6 client runtime layer: BitTorrentClient query/header template engine with {infohash}/{peerid}/{key}/{event}/{ip}/{ipv6}/{java}/{os}/{locale} placeholder resolution (byte-compatible with Java createRequestQuery), BitTorrentClientProvider with SemanticVersionFilenameComparator port for .client discovery and loading, plus TorrentSeedStats/ConnectionHandler placeholder types for S7/S9.
